title: ajax minor
intro: Ajax minor, also known as Ajuga reptans, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Ajax minor is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to treat conditions such as fever, coughs, and skin irritations.
